name: Lauterbrunnen Valley Waterfalls Hike
description: Hike through the valley of 72 waterfalls, including the 300m Staubbach Falls.
longDescription: Lauterbrunnen Valley is one of the most dramatic landscapes in the Alps, featuring 72 waterfalls cascading from sheer cliffs. The easy valley hike takes you past the iconic 300-meter Staubbach Falls, through charming villages, and to the Trümmelbach Falls — the only underground glacier waterfalls in Europe accessible by lift. J.R.R. Tolkien's inspiration for Rivendell.

providers.name: Self-guided (Free)
providers.description: Free valley hike — no guide or ticket needed

providers.name: SwissHiking Tours
providers.description: Guided full-day hike with local expert and lunch
